description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Claude Code Consolidated that triggers on issue comments, pull request review comments, pull request reviews, and issues. The workflow checks for mentions of '@claude' and runs a job on an ubuntu-latest environment with write permissions to repository contents, pull requests, and issues. The job checks out the repository, sets up a Python 3.11 environment, installs uv and dependencies, and runs the Claude Code action with an Anthropic API key from secrets.
